# interfaceNames()

**Type Method**

Returns the list of the names of available Wi-Fi interfaces.

## Declaration

```swift
class func interfaceNames() -> [String]?
```

## Return Value

An array of strings representing the names of the available Wi-Fi interfaces in the system. Any one of these names can be used with the [doc://com.apple.corewlan/documentation/CoreWLAN/CWWiFiClient/interface(withName:)] method to obtain a reference to the corresponding [doc://com.apple.corewlan/documentation/CoreWLAN/CWInterface] instance.

## Getting Interfaces

- **interface()**: Returns the default Wi-Fi interface.
- **interface(withName:)**: Returns the Wi-Fi interface with the given name.
- **interfaces()**: Returns all available Wi-Fi interfaces.

items.description: Returns the Wi-Fi interface with the given name.
